title: phileo #5368
definition:
1) to love
    1a) to approve of
    1b) to like
    1c) sanction
    1d) to treat affectionately or kindly, to welcome, befriend
 2) to show signs of love
    2a) to kiss
 3) to be fond of doing
    3a) be wont, use to do

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5914\\
